title: Delve: Combat Event
description: Trigger a dramatic event or complication during a fight within a Delve site.

data.value: Enemy reveals a new ability or tactic.
Reinforcements arrive or an ally joins the fray.
Environmental hazard intrudes on the fight.
An opening presents itself—if you act quickly.
You are driven back or cornered.
Something important is put in immediate danger.
The objective of the fight suddenly shifts.
A combatant attempts to flee or parley.
A dramatic twist changes the entire battle.
